title: croton ripensis
intro: Croton ripensis is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae), native to the Philippines. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Croton ripensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal purposes, and has been used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
